caption: In an indoor setting with wood-paneled walls and blinds, a group of people are gathered for a meeting or ceremony. A man wearing glasses and a black vest over a white shirt stands at a podium, addressing the seated audience. To his left, another man in a light blue shirt also stands behind a podium. The audience consists of several individuals seen from behind, including women wearing colorful shawls and yellow tops. A logo with the text "ORCA" appears on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man at the podium looks down at his papers. In the final frames, white text appears in the bottom left corner that reads "Bryan Blanchette" followed by "Prayers For The Elders" on the line below. The overall scene remains static, with minimal movement among the participants.
